instruction: Two issues on the speaker x mark icon: the base outline is wrongly tinted purple, AND the gray watermark square on top is the wrong color (blue). Fix both.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/speaker-x-mark.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #a855f7" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.25 9.75 19.5 12m0 0 2.25 2.25M19.5 12l2.25-2.25M19.5 12l-2.25 2.25m-10.5-6 4.72-4.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.28.53v15.88a.75.75 0 0 1-1.28.53l-4.72-4.72H4.51c-.88 0-1.704-.507-1.938-1.354A9.009 9.009 0 0 1 2.25 12c0-.83.112-1.633.322-2.396C2.806 8.756 3.63 8.25 4.51 8.25H6.75Z"/></g>
  <rect id="watermark" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.4" x="8" y="8" width="14" height="14" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/speaker-x-mark.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.25 9.75 19.5 12m0 0 2.25 2.25M19.5 12l2.25-2.25M19.5 12l-2.25 2.25m-10.5-6 4.72-4.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.28.53v15.88a.75.75 0 0 1-1.28.53l-4.72-4.72H4.51c-.88 0-1.704-.507-1.938-1.354A9.009 9.009 0 0 1 2.25 12c0-.83.112-1.633.322-2.396C2.806 8.756 3.63 8.25 4.51 8.25H6.75Z"/></g>
  <rect id="watermark" fill="#9ca3af" opacity="0.4" x="8" y="8" width="14" height="14" />
</svg>
